title: Action
description: A consequential action an agent intends to perform. Parameters are represented by a digest rather than embedded payload data.

action_id.description: Unique identifier for this action intent.

agent_id.description: Stable identifier for the agent requesting the action.

action_kind.description: Producer-defined action category, such as TOOL_CALL, API_REQUEST, or STATE_MUTATION.

tool_name.description: Canonical tool or target operation name.

params_hash.description: Opaque digest of the canonicalized action parameters, including any algorithm prefix chosen by the producer.

timestamp_ms.description: Unix timestamp in milliseconds, constrained to the JavaScript safe-integer range.

contractVersion.description: Semantic contract version. This package supports major version 1 and emits 1.0.0.

reversibilityClass.description: Design-time action reversibility classification aligned with OWASP AISVS C9.2.3.
